Cybersecurity Advisory

When You Get Breached, We're The Call You Make.

We partner with attorneys, IT businesses, and high-value individuals as their trusted forensic investigation and incident response team. When a breach happens, evidence needs preserving, and litigation is on the horizon — we're already working.

Attorneys trust us to conduct privileged forensic investigations that hold up in court. IT businesses trust us to be their invisible security team. When the stakes are highest, we deliver.
Quinnlan Varcoe
Principal DFIR Consultant
Our Practice
Digital Forensics &
Incident Response

When you have ransomware, attorneys are getting involved, and evidence needs preserving — call us now. We handle the crisis, and provide targeted additional capabilities like threat intel and detection engineering.

Breach & DFIR

Rapid breach containment, forensic investigation, ransomware negotiation, and evidence preservation.

Explore Service →

Attorney Partnerships

Privileged forensic investigation, expert witness testimony, and defensible documentation under attorney-client privilege.

For Attorneys →

Personal Forensics

Luxury cybersecurity, device audits, and ongoing digital privacy for high-net-worth individuals.

Explore Service →

Additional Capabilities

Advanced detection engineering, threat intelligence, and targeted defense advisory.

Learn More →
View All Capabilities →
Client Perspectives
Trusted by Security Leaders
An exceptional digital forensics specialist with deep technical depth across incident response, threat hunting, and evidence preservation. Her ability to bridge the gap between technical investigation and legal defensibility is unmatched.
Managing Partner
Litigation & eDiscovery
Her knowledge and experience has helped lead many incidents to remediation, especially during the Log4j exploit. Truly a pleasure to work with, learn from, and a valuable resource.
Fortune 500 Colleague
Enterprise Security
Unmatched technical expertise. Even under immense pressure and stress, this team performed with remarkable composure, precision, and efficiency. A force to be reckoned with.
Security Operations Leader
SOC Management
Engagement Tiers
Security Programs Built for Your Scale

Structured monthly retainers with clear deliverables, executive-level communication, and no long-term contracts required.

Tier 1
Starting at $995/mo
Essential security oversight for growing organizations that need expert guidance without full-time overhead.
What You Get
  • 24/7 monitoring and cybersecurity expert-led threat response
  • Complete endpoint, identity, and cloud security coverage
  • Continuous hardening, patching, and risk reduction by IT security experts
  • Dedicated support for incidents, alerts, and user issues
  • Clear reporting and strategic guidance from cybersecurity experts
Core Security Services
  • 24/7 Managed Detection and Response (MDR) services with continuous SOC monitoring and cybersecurity expert-led threat response
  • Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) services with IT security expert management, tuning, and threat remediation
  • Automated patch management services for operating systems and third-party applications
  • Backup monitoring services, integrity validation, and expert-led disaster recovery testing
IT & Identity Security Services
  • IT support services delivered by IT security experts, including helpdesk, remote, and on-site assistance
  • Microsoft 365 licensing services, CSP management, and expert tenant administration
  • Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) services with cybersecurity expert-led identity and access management (IAM)
  • Device enrollment services and Mobile Device Management (MDM) via Microsoft Intune with expert configuration
  • Privileged access management services with local admin removal and expert AutoElevate control
  • Browser security management services with centralized policy enforcement (Chrome and Edge)
Cloud & Workspace Security Services
  • Google Workspace security hardening services performed by cybersecurity experts
  • Microsoft 365 security hardening services across Entra ID, Intune, Exchange, SharePoint, and Teams by IT security experts
  • Email security, phishing protection, and collaboration security services
  • Cloud security posture management and SaaS application protection services
Compliance, Risk & Advisory Services
  • Risk register management services with continuous tracking and cybersecurity expert oversight
  • Incident Response Plan (IRP) development services with expert testing and annual review
  • Quarterly Business Review (QBR) services with IT security expert reporting and roadmap planning
  • Support for SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance initiatives
Included Security Technology Stack
  • Field Effect MDR platform supporting cybersecurity expert-led 24/7 SOC services, EDR, and threat detection
  • Cork cyber warranty platform supporting risk mitigation services with $50,000 breach coverage
  • Cork security posture and compliance management platform supporting cybersecurity expert advisory services
  • 1Password enterprise password management platform supporting identity security services
  • Beauceron Security awareness and phishing simulation platform supporting human risk management services
  • CyberFOX AutoElevate platform supporting privileged access management services and endpoint control
  • DNSFilter DNS security platform supporting web filtering and threat prevention services
  • Microsoft Defender for Office 365 platform supporting email security and collaboration protection services
Get Started
Most Popular
Tier 2
Starting at $4,995/mo
Comprehensive managed security for enterprises requiring dedicated operational support and incident readiness.
  • Everything in Tier 1
  • Dedicated security consultant
  • SOC optimization & tuning
  • Incident response retainer (24/7)
  • Detection engineering support
  • Monthly executive reporting
  • Vendor & tool evaluation
Schedule Consultation
Tier 3
Starting at $9,995/mo
Full-spectrum security operations for defense contractors, regulated industries, and high-value targets.
  • Everything in Tier 2
  • vCISO services
  • CMMC / NIST 800-171 program management
  • Red team & penetration testing
  • Dark web monitoring
  • Board-level security briefings
  • Privileged forensic investigation
  • Expert witness availability
Get Started

Need something tailored? We build custom programs for unique requirements.

Request Custom Proposal →
Quinnlan Varcoe
Principal DFIR Consultant

With operational experience across Fortune 50 security programs and the defense industrial base, Quinnlan founded Digital Forensics .company in 2022 to provide clients with the caliber of expertise typically reserved for the largest enterprises. Her work in threat intelligence and digital forensics has earned the trust of 26,000+ cybersecurity professionals who follow her analysis.

Fortune 50 BackgroundDefense IndustryThreat IntelligenceDigital PrivacyIncident Response
Full Biography →
Process
How We Work

A structured, transparent engagement process designed to respect your time and deliver measurable results.

01

Initial Consultation

Confidential, NDA-protected conversation to understand your security challenges and objectives.

02

Assessment & Scoping

Technical evaluation of your environment, threat landscape, and compliance requirements.

03

Strategic Proposal

Detailed engagement plan with clear deliverables, timelines, and pricing — no hidden costs.

04

Execution & Delivery

Hands-on implementation with regular communication and executive-level reporting.

Schedule Your Session

Book a Consultation

Select a time that works for you and connect directly with our team. Confidential, no-commitment conversations — we're here to help you understand your risk and build a path forward.

  • 30-minute introductory sessions available
  • Secure, NDA-protected conversation
  • Same-day availability for active incidents
  • No sales pitch — just expert guidance
Free Consultation
Speak with a Senior Analyst
30–60 minutes · Confidential · No obligation
Book a Consultation
or call 301-352-4855

Schedule a confidential consultation to discuss your challenges and how we can help.
